personalInfo.name: John Howard P. Garcia
personalInfo.title: Fullstack Developer & Mobile Developer
personalInfo.summary: Results-driven Front-End Developer with expertise in building modern, responsive web applications using Next.js, React, CSS3, HTML5, and TypeScript & Building Mobile Application using Flutter. Experienced in providing virtual assistance services including email/chat management and Shopify store customization. Passionate about creating intuitive user experiences and delivering high-quality work that exceeds client expectations.

experience.description: Develop custom web applications and websites for clients using modern technologies. Focus on creating responsive, accessible, and performant user interfaces.
responsibilities: Build responsive web applications using Next.js, React, and TypeScript
Build a Mobile Application using Flutter
Implement modern UI/UX designs with Tailwind CSS and Framer Motion
Optimize website performance and SEO for better search rankings
Collaborate with clients to understand requirements and deliver solutions
Maintain code quality through version control and best practices

experience.description: Assisted in the development of client websites and web applications. Gained hands-on experience with front-end technologies and industry best practices.
responsibilities: Developed responsive web pages using HTML, CSS, and JavaScript
Assisted senior developers with React component development
Participated in code reviews and implemented feedback
Maintained and updated existing client websites
Learned and applied modern web development workflows

experience.description: Provided technical support for web platforms and digital tools by troubleshooting issues, guiding users, and escalating complex incidents to developers.
responsibilities: Resolved user-reported issues across web apps, accounts, and integrations
Troubleshot bugs and reproduced incidents for faster root cause analysis
Provided clear support through email and chat with step-by-step guidance
Escalated complex technical issues and tracked them through resolution
Maintained support documentation and FAQs to reduce repeat tickets

experience.description: Provided comprehensive virtual assistance while supporting web operations. Managed customer communications and performed basic Shopify customizations.
responsibilities: Managed email and live chat support for customer inquiries
Performed basic Shopify Liquid customizations and theme edits
Handled product listings, inventory updates, and order processing
Maintained organized documentation and streamlined workflows
Collaborated with team members to improve customer experience

education.degree: Bachelor of Science in Computer Engineering
education.details: Relevant coursework: Web Development, Database Management, Software Engineering, UI/UX Design
Intensive program covering HTML, CSS, JavaScript, React, and Node.js

projects.title: Professional Portfolio Website
projects.description: A modern portfolio website showcasing projects and skills. Features dark/light mode, smooth animations, and responsive design.
highlights: Implemented theme switching with persistent user preference
Created smooth page transitions using Framer Motion
Built with Next.js for optimal performance and SEO
Fully responsive design for all screen sizes

Added filtering and sorting capabilities for task management

highlights: Optimized for fast loading and SEO performance
Integrated with Shopify's native features and apps
